'''fobalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiatused|hiatused]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiatused|hiatused]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fobalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fobalithi|fobalithi]] || [[word:fobaliji|fobaliji]] || [[word:fobalishi|fobalishi]] || [[word:fobaliki|fobaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fobaluthuthu|fobaluthuthu]] || [[word:fobalujuju|fobalujuju]] || [[word:fobalushushu|fobalushushu]] || [[word:fobalukuku|fobalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fobaluthu|fobaluthu]] || [[word:fobaluju|fobaluju]] || [[word:fobalushu|fobalushu]] || [[word:fobaluku|fobaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fobalufthuf|fobalufthuf]] || [[word:fobalufjuf|fobalufjuf]] || [[word:fobalufshuf|fobalufshuf]] || [[word:fobalufkuf|fobalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fobalethe|fobalethe]] || [[word:fobaleje|fobaleje]] || [[word:fobaleshe|fobaleshe]] || [[word:fobaleke|fobaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fobalothotho|fobalothotho]] || [[word:fobalojojo|fobalojojo]] || [[word:fobaloshosho|fobaloshosho]] || [[word:fobalokoko|fobalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fobalotho|fobalotho]] || [[word:fobalojo|fobalojo]] || [[word:fobalosho|fobalosho]] || [[word:fobaloko|fobaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fobalofthof|fobalofthof]] || [[word:fobalofjof|fobalofjof]] || [[word:fobalofshof|fobalofshof]] || [[word:fobalofkof|fobalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfthÃŸf|fobalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfjÃŸf|fobalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfshÃŸf|fobalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfkÃŸf|fobalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fobalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fobalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fobalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fobalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfthÃŸf|fobalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfjÃŸf|fobalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfshÃŸf|fobalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfkÃŸf|fobalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfthÃŸf|fobalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfjÃŸf|fobalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfshÃŸf|fobalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fobalÃŸfkÃŸf|fobalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fobalÃḊthÃḊ|fobalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fobalÃḊjÃḊ|fobalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fobalÃḊshÃḊ|fobalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fobalÃḊkÃḊ|fobalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fobalathatha|fobalathatha]] || [[word:fobalajaja|fobalajaja]] || [[word:fobalashasha|fobalashasha]] || [[word:fobalakaka|fobalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fobalatha|fobalatha]] || [[word:fobalaja|fobalaja]] || [[word:fobalasha|fobalasha]] || [[word:fobalaka|fobalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fobalafthaf|fobalafthaf]] || [[word:fobalafjaf|fobalafjaf]] || [[word:fobalafshaf|fobalafshaf]] || [[word:fobalafkaf|fobalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fobalasha|fobalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fobalshÃḋsha|fobalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fobalrosha|fobalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fobalmusha|fobalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fobalyasha|fobalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofobalnkshÃḋsha|gofobalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofobalnkrosha|gofobalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofobalnkmusha|gofobalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofobalnkyasha|gofobalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fobabalasha|fobabalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fobabalshÃḋsha|fobabalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fobabalrosha|fobabalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fobabalmusha|fobabalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fobabalyasha|fobabalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofobabalnkshÃḋsha|gofobabalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofobabalnkrosha|gofobabalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofobabalnkmusha|gofobabalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofobabalnkyasha|gofobabalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:febÃḊlasha|febÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:febÃḊlshÃḋsha|febÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:febÃḊlrosha|febÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:febÃḊlmusha|febÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:febÃḊlyasha|febÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofebÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|gofebÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofebÃḊlnkrosha|gofebÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofebÃḊlnkmusha|gofebÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofebÃḊlnkyasha|gofebÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fobfalasha|fobfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fobfalshÃḋsha|fobfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fobfalrosha|fobfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fobfalmusha|fobfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fobfalyasha|fobfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofobfalnkshÃḋsha|gofobfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofobfalnkrosha|gofobfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofobfalnkmusha|gofobfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofobfalnkyasha|gofobfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|59e8839}}
